title: Warm German Banana Pilaf
description: A peppery and snappy post-workout dish featuring banana, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal. This halal-friendly recipe is made with a deglaze-fond and served in a lazy-susan-spinner vessel.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced bananas and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the black pepper and salt, and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Scrape up the deglaze-fond from the bottom of the skillet.
Add the cooked basmati rice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Serve the pilaf hot in a lazy-susan-spinner vessel.
